headline: BTQ Technologies Completes Acquisition of QPerfect, Advancing Its Mission of Building Trusted Quantum Technologies With World-Class Emulation, Digital Twin, and Control Capabilities
summary: BTQ Technologies Corp. ("BTQ" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: BTQ) (CBOE CA: BTQ), a global quantum technology company focused on securing mission-critical networks, is pleased to announce that it has completed the acquisition of QPerfect SA ("QPerfect"), a French quantum computing company based in Strasbourg specializing in quantum software, emulation, digital twin capabilities, and control systems.
